content.en:
A thousand pieces of Ka Ye Wisdom Leaves, one drop of Ka Ye Wisdom Essence, plus some Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence, is enough for Ye Tian to hit the third level of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body 100%.

Of course, he still has to fully comprehend the third layer of the Ka Ye wisdom body, and if he cultivates directly and recklessly, there is a high probability that he will fail to break through.

Once the innate multi-dimensional Dao body fails to break through, the sequelae will be great, and in the most serious case, it will even fall and die.

Therefore, Ye Tian still continued to analyze the content of the third layer of the Kasya's wisdom body, and gradually understood the third layer of the Kasya's wisdom body.

this day.

Only then did Ye Tian begin to attack the third layer of the Ka Ye Intelligence Body.

The Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf, the Ka Ye Wisdom Essence, and the Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence were directly swallowed by Ye Tian, and then cultivated the Ka Ye Wisdom Body, and soon hit the bottleneck, and began to impact the third level of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body.

It is not so easy to break the bottleneck, and it will take at least dozens of extradimensional epochs.

For this reason, Ye Tian has been working hard to cultivate and hit the bottleneck little by little.

I have to say that the bottleneck of the third layer of the Ka Ye wisdom body is really extremely strong, no wonder the four thousand territory here, there are so few extra-dimensional realms that can really cultivate an innate multi-dimensional Dao body to the third layer.

In the blink of an eye, thirty-five extradimensional epochs had passed.

this day.

Rumble!!!!!

The bottleneck of the intelligent body of the 923 leaves of the Ga has been completely broken.

Ye Tian successfully broke through the Jiaye wisdom body from the limit of the second layer of Dacheng to the realm of the third layer of beginners.

At the same time, his physical body began to transform, his body became more and more tough, his strength continued to skyrocket, and his healing and recovery ability became extremely powerful.

And after the Ka Ye wisdom body breaks through to the third layer, the effect of the innate multi-dimensional secret technique of multi-dimensional wisdom light will inevitably skyrocket, which can help him comprehend the extradimensional rules faster, and the growth rate will be faster.

"It's time to go and obtain the third innate multi-dimensional Dao body!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The general innate multi-dimensional Dao body, he can't look down on it at the moment, what he wants is an innate multi-dimensional Dao body that is comparable to or second only to the body of the black mother.

And according to the information given by the Extinction Realm Lord, he already had a choice.

【10-Dimensional Celestial Bodies】

This is the innate multi-dimensional Dao body of the fifth realm of the master of the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower, there are a total of five levels of realm, it is said that once you cultivate to the fifth layer realm, you can cross the tenth dimension of the physical body, and you can return from the 4,000 territory to the 7,000 territory in an instant.

In terms of special effects, the value of the 10-dimensional celestial body (BDBC) is still higher than that of the black mother's body.

It's just that the Wumu Realm Master has broken through to the sixth realm, which makes the Wumu body famous, but in fact, the value is not necessarily higher than that of the ten-dimensional celestial body.

And the cultivation of the Extinction Realm Lord is a ten-dimensional celestial body, but the Extinction Realm Lord only has the first three layers of the Shiwei celestial body.

But even if he only cultivated to the third layer of the first realm, the Extinction Realm Lord could easily escape into the fifth dimension, so as to avoid the prying eyes of other fourth realms, but such a method could not avoid some special fourth realms, and there was no way to avoid the fifth realm.

The Lord of the Extinction Realm also said that it was very difficult to obtain the inheritance of the ten-dimensional celestial body, and he also had nine out of nine luck, so he succeeded in obtaining the inheritance of the ten-dimensional celestial body, and if he was unlucky, he would fall directly.

Therefore, the Extinction Realm Lord did not recommend that Ye Tian obtain the inheritance of the ten-dimensional celestial body, and could choose to obtain the inheritance of other innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies.

But Ye Tian is more interested in the ten-dimensional celestial body, and the goal is it.

......

Territory of four thousand one hundred.

Falling Wind Valley.

This is a place of wonder in the Void of Death, and the place where the ten-dimensional celestial bodies are inherited is here.

The Lord of the Extinction Realm was also lucky, and fell here in an escape, and only then did he enter the land of the ten-dimensional celestial body inheritance.

Ye Tian entered the Falling Wind Valley, and a cold cold wind hit, making him tremble a little in the fourth realm.

"It is worthy of the Falling Wind Valley of the Jedi, and entering the ordinary Fourth Realm here is almost certain death!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

As far as he knew, the wind here contained a wisp of multidimensional tribulation.

I don't know why, even after countless years and the multi-dimensional tribulation, there are still wisps of calamity here, and once you enter here, you must bear the damage of the calamity.

"This is just a wisp of calamity, if it is a multi-dimensional tribulation, the calamity wind is afraid that it will be even more terrifying, no wonder without the protection of the fifth realm, only a very small number of the fourth realm can survive. "

This is the first time that Ye Tian has truly realized the horror of the multi-dimensional tribulation, if the heavens and the earth are all such tribulations, he will not be able to protect the human race at all.

Fortunately, there is still a long time before the next multidimensional tribulation, which is enough for him to grow.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian kept searching in the Falling Wind Valley, and finally found the location of the inheritance place that the Lord of the Extinction Realm said.

"This is it!"

Ye Tian looked at a black cave in front of him, and layers of dimensions were revealed inside this cave, and the inheritance place was impressively in the fifth dimension.

According to the information said by the Lord of the Extinction Realm, this inheritance place in the fifth dimension is extremely dangerous, just by entering it, you will have to face an even more terrifying catastrophe, hundreds of millions of passages, the catastrophe is unpredictable, and it is impossible to deduce it at all, maybe the safe route you take now will be dangerous in the next second.

The Extinction Realm Lord didn't dare to go a second time, otherwise he would definitely die.

According to the Lord of the Extinction Realm, he once sold the information here to several Fourth Realms, and as a result, those few died here, causing him to be hunted down and killed by many Fourth Realms for a period of time.

Ye Tian didn't go in directly, but condensed a copy body here, and only then did he break into this void in the fifth dimension.

Wow!

Ye Tian had just entered the fifth dimension here, and the next moment he was faced with a terrifying calamity.

This is still just entering, and what I encountered was just the most ordinary calamity.

At this time, hundreds of millions of tribulation passages appeared in front of him, and each passage seemed to be similar, there was no difference.

"Choose any passage!"

Ye Tian decided.

Wow!

He shuttled into one of the Storm Passages.

In the next moment, the Tribulation Wind in this Tribulation Passage suddenly changed, and it seemed to become hundreds of times stronger.

Rumble!!!!!

The terrifying wind directly crushed Ye Tian's body and killed this copy body.

"It's dangerous. "

Ye Tian sighed.

Immediately, he wanted to try to comprehend something from these hundreds of millions of channels to see if there was any law, but after contemplating it for a long time, he still didn't see any law at all.

"Why did that Fifth Realm set up such a dangerous inheritance place?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

He continued to meditate, and gradually, he thought of a possibility.
